title: Item Addon Pack
description: This resourcepack adds over 1500 new fantasy and medieval item textures to your game. Weapons, shields, helmets, tools, food, materials and so much more!
body:
![Item_Banner](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/714242847074811985/1030503754144948394/item_banner.png?width=1026&height=215)

**Item Addon Pack**

This resourcepack adds over 1500 new fantasy and medieval item textures to your game. Weapons, shields, helmets, tools, food, materials and so much more! Find all textures in my Wiki: https://rpaddons.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Addon 


**Dependencies**

- [OptiFine (1.18.2+)](https://optifine.net/downloads)*

- OR ( Fabric with CITResewn )

**This pack is (in theory!) compatible with all Minecraft versions 1.13+ and maybe even earlier...
**BUT!** I only tested it for the versions promoted on this page and won't fix problems on older versions!*


**Installation**

- Download the texturepack

- Drag it into your resource pack folder

    - Either via .minecraft -> resourcepacks

    - Or ingame via [ESC] -> Options -> Resourcepacks -> Open Folder...

- Activate the texture pack


**Getting items**

- Find a texture you want to use on my [Wiki](https://rpaddons.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Addon)

- Rename the item in an anvil

 
**Errors and questions**

*(Discord is not yet fully translated)*


**Other projects**

[![Wiki](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/714242847074811985/1030866186348544020/wiki_icon_small.png)](https://rpaddons.fandom.com/wiki/RP-Addons_Wiki)
[![Playermodels Addon](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/714242847074811985/1030866187367759953/mpm_icon_small.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mpm_addon)
[![GUI Addon](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/714242847074811985/1030866186700857404/gui_icon_small.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui_addon)


*Please leave credit when you use this pack in Livestreams, Videos, or other projects.*
